fullDescription.text: Pin a non-root uid so a container escape does not begin as host uid 0.

help.text:
Pin a non-root uid so a container escape does not begin as host uid 0.

Fix: user: "65532:65532"
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Pin a non-root uid so a container escape does not begin as host uid 0.

**Fix:** `user: "65532:65532"`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Drop every Linux capability; add back only what the workload provably needs.

help.text:
Drop every Linux capability; add back only what the workload provably needs.

Fix: cap_drop: [ALL]
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Drop every Linux capability; add back only what the workload provably needs.

**Fix:** `cap_drop: [ALL]`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Keep a seccomp profile active to shrink the reachable syscall surface.

help.text:
Keep a seccomp profile active to shrink the reachable syscall surface.

Fix: security_opt: [no-new-privileges:true]  (and remove any seccomp=unconfined)
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Keep a seccomp profile active to shrink the reachable syscall surface.

**Fix:** `security_opt: [no-new-privileges:true]  (and remove any seccomp=unconfined)`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Cut egress so a compromised workload cannot reach the network or exfiltrate.

help.text:
Cut egress so a compromised workload cannot reach the network or exfiltrate.

Fix: network_mode: none
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Cut egress so a compromised workload cannot reach the network or exfiltrate.

**Fix:** `network_mode: none`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Make the root filesystem read-only to remove the tamper/persistence surface.

help.text:
Make the root filesystem read-only to remove the tamper/persistence surface.

Fix: read_only: true
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Make the root filesystem read-only to remove the tamper/persistence surface.

**Fix:** `read_only: true`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Mounting the container-runtime socket is a one-command host-root escape.

help.text:
Mounting the container-runtime socket is a one-command host-root escape.

Fix: remove the docker.sock entry from the service's volumes:
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Mounting the container-runtime socket is a one-command host-root escape.

**Fix:** `remove the docker.sock entry from the service's volumes:`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

fullDescription.text: Do not share host namespaces; each shared namespace erases an isolation boundary.

help.text:
Do not share host namespaces; each shared namespace erases an isolation boundary.

Fix: remove pid: host
More: https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/
help.markdown:
Do not share host namespaces; each shared namespace erases an isolation boundary.

**Fix:** `remove pid: host`

[Hardening guide](https://ironsecco.github.io/ironclaw/scan/)

message.text: Non-root user (uid != 0) (FAIL): runs as root (user "0"); a container escape starts with host-uid 0. Fix: user: "65532:65532"
Dropped capabilities (FAIL): default capability set retained (includes CAP_NET_RAW, CAP_MKNOD, …). Fix: cap_drop: [ALL]
Seccomp profile (FAIL): seccomp=unconfined: the full syscall surface is exposed. Fix: security_opt: [no-new-privileges:true]  (and remove any seccomp=unconfined)
Network isolation / egress (WARN): network=bridge: outbound egress is possible; prefer network=none. Fix: network_mode: none
Read-only root filesystem (FAIL): root filesystem is writable: tamper/persistence surface. Fix: read_only: true
No docker.sock exposure (FAIL): docker.sock is mounted: trivial host-root escape (docker run --privileged -v /:/host). Fix: remove the docker.sock entry from the service's volumes:
No shared host namespaces (FAIL): shares host namespace(s): PID. Fix: remove pid: host
